name: Servicenow Accounts Never Used (90 days)
description: Detects active Servicenow accounts older than 90 days that have never logged in.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.created_at AS created_at FROM servicenow_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.active, true) = true AND u.last_login_at IS NULL AND u.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
remediation: Remove or disable never-used accounts and fix any over-provisioning in onboarding workflows.
